message:
Add proper font rendering for URL bar using stb_truetype

- Add stb_truetype for text rendering directly to RGBA buffers
- Add nanosvg for SVG-based toolbar button rendering
- Create font.zig for FontRenderer with system font loading (SF Pro/Helvetica)
- Create svg.zig and toolbar.zig for Kitty graphics-based toolbar
- Remove old TUI/ncurses-based toolbar code
- Fix toolbar re-rendering in URL prompt mode
- Increase output buffer sizes for graphics rendering (256KB)
- Add debug logging for toolbar initialization and URL prompt mode
